metadata.name: proofbook
metadata.description: ProofBook — fully on-chain, trustlessly-settled World Cup prediction markets

instructions.name: cancel_market
docs: Liveness escape hatch: Locked -> Cancelled once `now > lock_time +
resolution_timeout`. Permissionless, time-triggered, sets no winner.

accounts.name: canceller
docs: Any signer (has no special power; pays the tx fee).

instructions.name: cancel_prop_vault
docs: Liveness backstop: after the timeout, anyone may return the money to the
depositor. The only non-proof path, and it can never pay the beneficiary.

accounts.name: canceller
docs: Permissionless liveness backstop.

instructions.name: claim_refund
docs: On a Cancelled market, reclaim the exact original stake (no fee). One-shot.

instructions.name: claim_winnings
docs: Pay a winner their pro-rata share of the (post-fee) pool. One-shot.

instructions.name: initialize_combo_spec
docs: Attach a compound (multi-leg) resolution spec to a market, so it can be
settled by proving several stats in ONE `validate_stat_v3` CPI.
Open markets only; the spec is structurally validated on the way in.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The market's creator. Has no power over settlement — only over which
predicate the market was BORN with, which is exactly what this sets.

instructions.name: initialize_market
docs: Create a market PDA + USDC vault. Validates fee, outcome count, lock time,
resolution timeout, and per-outcome resolution specs. Binds the market to
the active oracle and records the fee treasury.

accounts.name: vault
docs: USDC escrow vault owned by the market PDA.

instructions.name: initialize_prop_vault
docs: Escrow USDC against a compound predicate. The predicate is fixed here and
structurally validated, so a vault that could never settle cannot be funded.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Escrow, owned by the vault PDA. Not by us, and not by the beneficiary.

instructions.name: lock_market
docs: Open -> Locked, permissionlessly, at/after `lock_time`.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless crank — any signer may lock once `lock_time` has passed.

instructions.name: place_bet
docs: Stake USDC on an outcome while the market is Open and before `lock_time`.

accounts.name: position
docs: One position per (market, bettor); backs a single outcome.

instructions.name: settle_market
docs: Locked -> Settled iff the oracle adapter verifies the claimed outcome.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless settler (pays fees; has no special authority).

accounts.name: oracle_program
docs: equal the active adapter's program id. It is the `validate_stat` CPI target.

accounts.name: oracle_roots
docs: derived from `oracle_program` and `proof.ts`. Read-only in the CPI.

instructions.name: settle_market_v3
docs: Locked -> Settled for a COMPOUND market: every leg proven together against
one shared Merkle multiproof, in a single `validate_stat_v3` CPI.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless settler (pays fees; has no special authority).

accounts.name: combo_spec
docs: The compound predicate. Bound to this market by PDA seeds AND by the
stored `market` field — a spec from another market cannot be substituted.

accounts.name: oracle_program
docs: equal the active adapter's program id. It is the `validate_stat_v3` target.

accounts.name: oracle_roots
docs: derived from `oracle_program` and `proof.ts`. Read-only in the CPI.

instructions.name: settle_prop_vault
docs: Permissionless. The PROOF decides where the money goes: predicate holds ->
beneficiary, predicate fails -> depositor. No admin key on either path.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless. Whoever holds a valid proof may trigger this; they gain
nothing by it. The PROOF decides where the money goes, not the caller.

accounts.name: beneficiary_token
docs: Paid iff the predicate HOLDS.

accounts.name: depositor_token
docs: Refunded iff the predicate FAILS.

instructions.name: withdraw_fees
docs: Push the accrued protocol fee to the treasury. Settled markets only, once.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Any signer may push fees to the treasury (has no special power).

accounts.name: fee_treasury
docs: wallet that must own the destination token account.

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee exceeds the maximum allowed basis points.

errors.name: InvalidOutcomeCount
errors.msg: Outcome count out of range (must be MIN_OUTCOMES..=MAX_OUTCOMES).

errors.name: LockTimeInPast
errors.msg: Lock time must be in the future.

errors.name: InvalidOutcomeSpec
errors.msg: Invalid outcome spec: `op` must be Some iff the outcome uses two stats.

errors.name: InvalidFixtureId
errors.msg: fixture_id / match_id must be positive.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Bet amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: InvalidOutcomeIndex
errors.msg: Outcome index is out of range for this market.

errors.name: MarketNotOpen
errors.msg: Market is not open for betting.

errors.name: BettingClosed
errors.msg: Betting is closed (past lock time).

errors.name: CannotSwitchOutcome
errors.msg: A position can only back one outcome; open a new position for another outcome.

errors.name: WrongMint
errors.msg: Provided token account does not match the market's USDC mint.

errors.name: TooEarlyToLock
errors.msg: Too early to lock: current time is before lock_time.

errors.name: NotLocked
errors.msg: Market must be Locked before it can be settled.

errors.name: AlreadySettled
errors.msg: Market is already settled; settlement is idempotent and one-shot.

errors.name: WrongOracleProgram
errors.msg: Provided oracle program does not match the market's trusted oracle.

errors.name: OracleAdapterMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle program does not match the active adapter's program id.

errors.name: FixtureMismatch
errors.msg: Proof fixture_id does not match this market's fixture_id.

errors.name: ProofShapeMismatch
errors.msg: Proof shape does not match the outcome spec (stat_b presence mismatch).

errors.name: WrongDailyRootAccount
errors.msg: Provided daily-scores account is not the PDA for the proof timestamp.

errors.name: OracleReturnedNothing
errors.msg: Oracle CPI returned no data.

errors.name: OracleReturnMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle return data came from an unexpected program.

errors.name: OutcomeNotVerified
errors.msg: Outcome could not be verified by the oracle; refusing to settle.

errors.name: InvalidComboSpec
errors.msg: Compound market spec is malformed (leg count, outcome count, or an out-of-range leg index).

errors.name: DuplicateLegCoverage
errors.msg: A leg is evaluated more than once by one outcome; TxLINE rejects duplicate stat coverage.

errors.name: IncompleteLegCoverage
errors.msg: An outcome leaves a leg unevaluated; TxLINE requires every proven stat to be covered.

errors.name: WrongComboSpec
errors.msg: This ComboSpec does not belong to the market being settled.

errors.name: ComboRequiresV3
errors.msg: Compound markets must be settled with settle_market_v3, not settle_market.

errors.name: NotAComboMarket
errors.msg: settle_market_v3 requires a compound market type (>= COMBO_MARKET_TYPE_MIN).

errors.name: LegCountMismatch
errors.msg: Proof leaf count does not match the ComboSpec's leg count.

errors.name: LegStatMismatch
errors.msg: Proof leaf does not match the stat (key/period) the ComboSpec pins for that leg.

errors.name: WrongBeneficiary
errors.msg: Provided beneficiary token account is not owned by the vault's beneficiary.

errors.name: WrongDepositor
errors.msg: Provided depositor token account is not owned by the vault's depositor.

errors.name: SelfHedgeVault
errors.msg: Beneficiary must differ from the depositor: settlement passes both token accounts as distinct writable accounts, so a self-hedge vault could never settle — only time out into a refund.

errors.name: NotSettled
errors.msg: Market is not settled yet.

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Position has already been claimed.

errors.name: NotAWinningPosition
errors.msg: This position did not back the winning outcome; no payout.

errors.name: ZeroWinningPool
errors.msg: Winning pool has zero stake; nothing to claim.

errors.name: WrongVault
errors.msg: Provided vault does not belong to this market.

errors.name: InvalidResolutionTimeout
errors.msg: Resolution timeout must be positive.

errors.name: AlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Market is already resolved (Settled or Cancelled).

errors.name: TooEarlyToCancel
errors.msg: Too early to cancel: now <= lock_time + resolution_timeout.

errors.name: NotCancelled
errors.msg: Market is not cancelled; refunds are not available.

errors.name: WrongFeeTreasury
errors.msg: Provided fee destination is not owned by the market's fee treasury.

errors.name: FeesAlreadyWithdrawn
errors.msg: Protocol fee has already been withdrawn.

errors.name: NothingToWithdraw
errors.msg: There is no fee to withdraw (zero-fee or cancelled market).

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow.

errors.name: MathUnderflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic underflow.

types.name: ComboOutcome
docs: One outcome of a compound market: an AND of predicates over the market's legs.

types.name: ComboSpec
docs: The compound resolution spec for a market, at PDA `["combo", market]`.
INVARIANT (enforced at init, so it cannot fail at settle time): every outcome
must reference EVERY leg EXACTLY ONCE. TxLINE validates the whole payload in
one shot and errors if any proven stat is evaluated twice
(`DuplicateStatCoverage`, 6070) or left unevaluated (`IncompleteStatCoverage`,
6071) — both confirmed live against the devnet oracle. Checking it here turns
two settle-time failure modes into one create-time failure.
A direct consequence: a parlay's legs must read DISJOINT stats. "Home win AND
over 2.5 goals" is NOT expressible — both legs read goals P1/P2 — while
"Home win AND over 9.5 corners" is, because goals and corners are disjoint.

fields.name: market
docs: The market this spec resolves. Checked against the passed market at settle.

fields.name: legs
docs: The stats proven for this market. Order defines the `LegPredicate` indices
AND the order of `statKeys` in the proof request — they must agree.

fields.name: outcomes
docs: One entry per market outcome, in the same order as `Market.outcomes`.

types.name: ComboSpecCreated
docs: A compound (multi-leg) resolution spec was attached to a market. Emitted at
creation so an indexer can render the parlay's legs without reading the PDA.

types.name: LegPredicate
docs: A predicate over one leg, or over two legs combined with `op`.
Indices are into `ComboSpec.legs`.

fields.name: authority
docs: Creator (used only in the PDA seeds; has NO power over settlement).

fields.name: fixture_id
docs: TxLINE fixtureId == the on-chain match_id.

fields.name: market_type
docs: Opaque product-level market type tag (e.g. 0 = 1X2 match result).

fields.name: winning_outcome
docs: Winning outcome index after settlement; `UNSET_OUTCOME` until then.

fields.name: lock_time
docs: Betting closes at/after this Unix-seconds time.

fields.name: resolution_timeout
docs: Seconds after `lock_time` before `cancel_market` may be called (liveness
escape hatch). `cancel` is legal only once `now > lock_time + timeout`.

fields.name: oracle_program
docs: Trusted oracle program (TxLINE or mock) — CPI target for settlement.

fields.name: fee_treasury
docs: Wallet that owns the fee destination token account (`withdraw_fees` target).

fields.name: total_winning_pool
docs: Snapshot of the winning outcome's pool at settlement (payout denominator).

fields.name: fee_amount
docs: Fee reserved out of the pool at settlement (0 on Cancelled markets).

fields.name: paid_out
docs: Running sum of winner payouts already claimed (solvency + exact-remainder).

fields.name: winning_stake_claimed
docs: Running sum of winning stake already claimed (detects the last claimer).

fields.name: fee_withdrawn
docs: True once the protocol fee has been withdrawn to the treasury.

fields.name: settle_proof_ref
docs: The events-subtree root proven at settlement.

fields.name: settle_proof_ts
docs: Batch timestamp (Unix ms) whose daily root was checked.

fields.name: settle_epoch_day
docs: `floor(settle_proof_ts / 86_400_000)` — the daily-root epoch day.

fields.name: settle_daily_roots
docs: The oracle's `daily_scores_merkle_roots` PDA that was verified against.

fields.name: settle_resolver
docs: The account that submitted the winning proof (has no special power).

types.name: MarketCancelled
docs: Emitted when a stalled market is cancelled (liveness escape hatch).

fields.name: reason
docs: "timeout" (never resolved) | "zero_winning_pool" (verified, none staked).

fields.name: canceller
docs: The account that triggered the cancel (no special power).

types.name: MarketSettled
docs: Emitted on trustless settlement — the full Proof Receipt data contract.
See `docs/ONCHAIN_INTERFACE.md` for how to reconstruct & verify a receipt.

fields.name: oracle_label
docs: Which adapter verified the outcome ("txline" | "mock").

fields.name: proof_ref
docs: The events-subtree root proven at settlement (proof-receipt anchor).

fields.name: proof_ts
docs: Batch timestamp (Unix ms) whose daily root was checked.

fields.name: epoch_day
docs: `floor(proof_ts / 86_400_000)` — the daily-root epoch day.

fields.name: daily_roots
docs: The oracle `daily_scores_merkle_roots` PDA verified against.

fields.name: resolver
docs: The account that submitted the winning proof (no special power).

fields.name: oracle_verified
docs: The oracle CPI's `validate_stat` return value (always `true` on settle).

fields.name: refundable
docs: True when the winning outcome had zero stake → market is refundable.

types.name: MarketStatus
docs: Lifecycle status of a market.
Legal transitions (enforced per-instruction):
Open ──lock_market──► Locked ──settle_market(winner pool > 0)──► Settled
├─settle_market(winner pool == 0)──► Cancelled (refundable)
└─cancel_market(after timeout)─────► Cancelled (refundable)
`Settled` and `Cancelled` are terminal: no re-settle, no settle-after-cancel,
no cancel-after-settle. Winners claim on `Settled`; everyone refunds on `Cancelled`.

types.name: OutcomeSpec
docs: How a single outcome is resolved against TxLINE stats. Fixed at market
creation, so settlement can only ever prove the outcome it was configured
to prove (see `oracle::build_and_verify`).
Example — 1X2 on full-game goals (stat_a = P1 goals, stat_b = P2 goals):
Home win: op=Subtract, cmp=GreaterThan, threshold=0   (P1 - P2 > 0)
Away win: op=Subtract, cmp=LessThan,    threshold=0   (P1 - P2 < 0)
Draw    : op=Subtract, cmp=EqualTo,     threshold=0   (P1 - P2 == 0)

types.name: OutcomeState
docs: An outcome's resolution spec plus its running staked pool.

fields.name: outcome_index
docs: The single outcome this position backs.

fields.name: amount
docs: Total USDC staked by this owner on `outcome_index`.

types.name: PropVault
docs: A USDC vault that pays out automatically on a verified compound predicate.
"Team A corners + Team B corners > 10" — parametric insurance whose parameter
is a merkle-proven fact rather than an adjuster's opinion. Settled by a SINGLE
`validate_stat_v3` proof, permissionlessly.
The predicate is the same shape as a parlay's: an AND over legs, with the same
coverage invariant (every leg evaluated exactly once). It is fixed at creation
and validated there, so a vault that could never settle cannot be funded.

fields.name: beneficiary
docs: Paid iff the predicate holds. May be the depositor (a self-hedge).

fields.name: vault_id
docs: Distinguishes several vaults from the same depositor (PDA seed).

fields.name: legs
docs: The stats proven. Order defines the predicate index space.

fields.name: predicates
docs: AND-combined. Must cover every leg exactly once.

fields.name: lock_time
docs: The result is not knowable before this; settlement is refused earlier.

fields.name: resolution_timeout
docs: After `lock_time + this`, anyone may refund the depositor.

types.name: PropVaultCreated
docs: A parametric prop vault was funded. The predicate is fixed from here.

types.name: PropVaultResolved
docs: The vault resolved. `predicate_held` decided where the money went — not a key.

fields.name: amount
docs: Exact original stake, returned with no fee.

fields.name: ts
docs: Batch timestamp (Unix ms) — selects the daily root PDA.

fields.name: event_stat_root
docs: Shared event-stat root for all stats in this batch (v2).

fields.name: stat_a_value
docs: Proven value of stat A (its key/period come from the outcome spec).

fields.name: has_stat_b
docs: Only meaningful when the outcome spec uses two stats.

fields.name: ts
docs: Batch timestamp (Unix ms) — selects the daily root PDA.

fields.name: leaf_values
docs: Proven value of each leg, in `ComboSpec.legs` order. Keys/periods are NOT
taken from here — they come from the spec.

fields.name: multiproof_hashes
docs: The shared multiproof: sibling hashes + the leaves' indices in the tree.

types.name: StatLeg
docs: One stat this market proves: a TxLINE `(key, period)` pair.
`key = period*1000 + base`, where base 1/2 = goals, 3/4 = yellows,
5/6 = reds, 7/8 = corners. `period` is the ScoreStat period (100 = finalised).

fields.name: is_last_claimer
docs: True when this claim was the final winning stake (absorbs rounding dust).

constants.name: COMBO_SEED
docs: Sidecar holding a compound (multi-leg) resolution spec for a market.

constants.name: PROP_VAULT_SEED
docs: Parametric prop vault: pays out on a verified compound predicate.
